message:
feat(vc_tui): implement Elm Model trait for App (bd-h8l)

Restructure vc_tui App to implement ftui::Model, introducing the Elm
update loop alongside the existing ratatui render path. This enables
incremental screen-by-screen migration to FrankenTUI.

Changes:
- Add Screen::Rch variant (14 screens total, was 13)
- Add missing data fields: machines, alerts, guardian, events, beads, rch
- Define AppMessage enum (Key, Tick, ScreenChanged, DataRefreshed, Error, Quit)
- Define ScreenData enum for typed refresh payloads
- Implement From<ftui::Event> for AppMessage
- Implement ftui::Model: init, update, view (stub dispatch), subscriptions
- Wire all 11 existing render functions in legacy ratatui render() path
- Add 18 new Elm Model tests + update existing screen tests for 14 screens
- Keep legacy handle_key() and render() for backward compat during migration

Unblocks: bd-53p (inline mode), bd-mhu (keyboard port), bd-0di/bd-1l8/
bd-rq9/bd-1l1 (screen ports)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
